ambiguity_notes: The bare token lung is an organ/tissue term and must not trigger lung cancer or LUAD/LUSC.
CRC or explicit colorectal cancer may map to COAD and READ; isolated colon cancer or rectal cancer should use subtype-specific records.
BMI is retained as a reporting abbreviation for obesity but BMI alone should map to body mass index, not obesity.

Broad ambiguous sequencing term; do not strongly infer a specific sequencing assay.
HR may also mean heart rate; use as effect measure in Meta Analysis context.
OR must not match lowercase word or.
RR overlaps relative risk.
Relative risk often abbreviated RR.
MD can be an abbreviation in other domains; keep as effect measure.
Lowercase r is not added as a strict abbreviation to avoid broad matching.
CI must not match ordinary text.
SE is a short token requiring strict boundary matching.
Single P is not added as strict abbreviation to avoid broad matching.
OS is an outcome abbreviation only in Meta Analysis context.
CR may also mean complete remission or other terms.
PR can also mean progesterone receptor; keep ambiguous.
SD can also mean standard deviation; keep ambiguous.
PD can also mean Parkinson disease; keep ambiguous.
